messages.content: <answer>The image shows a man in a white lab coat standing in front of a green screen.</answer>

Thanks—got it: a man in a white lab coat standing in front of a green screen.

If you want, tell me what you need next (e.g., a more detailed description, alt text, caption ideas, or identifying objects/pose/background).

当然可以。你这句话可以翻译成：

**“图像显示一名穿着白大褂的男子站在绿幕前。”**

也可以更自然一点：

**“画面中，一位身穿白色实验服的男性站在绿色背景（绿幕）前。”**
